description.ar: اطلب حذف حساب StartMessaging الخاص بك وجميع البيانات المرتبطة به. تكتمل العملية خلال 30 يوماً.

title.pt: Exclusão de Conta e Diretrizes de Limpeza de Dados
title.es: Eliminación de Cuenta y Pautas de Purga de Datos
title.tr: Hesap Silme ve Veri Temizleme Yönergeleri

subtitle.en: Step-by-step instructions on how to permanently close your account, request unused wallet refunds, initiate data purge cycles, and understand legal data retention requirements. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Instruções passo a passo sobre como fechar permanentemente sua conta, solicitar reembolsos de saldo de carteira, iniciar ciclos de eliminação de dados e compreender os requisitos legais de retenção de dados. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Instrucciones paso a paso sobre cómo cerrar permanentemente su cuenta, solicitar reembolsos de saldo de billetera, iniciar ciclos de eliminación de datos y comprender los requisitos legales de retención de datos. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Petunjuk langkah demi langkah tentang cara menutup akun Anda secara permanen, meminta pengembalian saldo dompet, memulai siklus pembersihan data, dan memahami persyaratan retensi data yang sah. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: تعليمات خطوة بخطوة حول كيفية إغلاق حسابك بشكل دائم، وطلب استرداد رصيد المحفظة، وبدء دورات تطهير البيانات، وفهم المتطلبات القانونية للاحتفاظ بالبيانات. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: Hesabınızı kalıcı olarak nasıl kapatacağınız, kullanılmayan cüzdan bakiyesinin iadesini nasıl talep edeceğiniz, veri silme döngülerini nasıl başlatacağınız ve yasal veri saklama gereksinimlerimizi anlama yönergesi. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
How to Delete Your Account

You can request the deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data at any time. There are two ways to initiate account deletion:

Option 1: Through Your Dashboard

  1. Log in to your StartMessaging dashboard at app.startmessaging.com
  2. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account
  3. Confirm your request by entering your password
  4. Your account will be deactivated immediately and permanently deleted within 30 days.

Option 2: Via Email

  1. Send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account
  2. Subject line: "Account Deletion Request"
  3. Include your registered email address and company name
  4. We will process your request within 30 days.

What Gets Deleted

When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:

  • Your account profile and credentials
  • All API keys and webhook configurations
  • Message templates and chatbot flows
  • Contact lists and audience segments
  • Campaign history and analytics data
  • Message logs and delivery reports

What We Retain

Per legal requirements, we retain the following for the specified periods:

  • Billing and tax records: 7 years (required by global tax regulations).
  • Aggregate anonymized analytics: Indefinitely (cannot be traced back to you).
  • Legal compliance records: As required by applicable law.

Important Notes

  • Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
  • Active subscriptions will be canceled immediately with no refund for the current billing period.
  • If you have an Enterprise plan, please contact your account manager before requesting deletion.

Contact

For questions about account deletion: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
content.in:
How to Delete Your Account

You can request the deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data at any time. There are two ways to initiate account deletion:

Option 1: Through Your Dashboard

  1. Log in to your StartMessaging dashboard at app.startmessaging.com
  2. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account
  3. Confirm your request by entering your password
  4. Your account will be deactivated immediately and permanently deleted within 30 days.

Option 2: Via Email

  1. Send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account
  2. Subject line: "Account Deletion Request"
  3. Include your registered email address and company name
  4. State whether you would like any remaining wallet balance refunded before deletion.
  5. We will process your request within 30 days.

What Gets Deleted

When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:

  • Your account profile and credentials
  • All API keys and webhook configurations
  • Message templates and chatbot flows
  • Contact lists and audience segments
  • Campaign history and analytics data
  • Message logs and delivery reports

What We Retain

Per legal requirements, we retain the following for the specified periods:

  • Billing and tax records: 5 years (required under Indian Income Tax Act and GST regulations).
  • Aggregate anonymized analytics: Indefinitely (cannot be traced back to you).
  • Telecom logs: Message routing records as required by TRAI compliance.

Important Notes

  • Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
  • Any remaining account balance or wallet credits will be forfeited unless a refund is requested before deletion is completed.

Contact

For questions about account deletion: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348 | WhatsApp: +91 6376383348
content.pt:
Como Excluir Sua Conta

Você pode solicitar a exclusão da sua conta StartMessaging e de todos os dados associados a qualquer momento. Há duas maneiras de iniciar a exclusão da conta:

Opção 1: Através do Seu Painel

  1. Faça login no seu painel StartMessaging em app.startmessaging.com
  2. Vá para Configurações → Conta → Excluir Conta
  3. Confirme sua solicitação inserindo sua senha
  4. Sua conta será desativada imediatamente e excluída permanentemente em até 30 dias.

Opção 2: Por E-mail

  1. Envie um e-mail para startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com a partir do endereço de e-mail associado à sua conta
  2. Assunto: "Solicitação de Exclusão de Conta"
  3. Inclua seu endereço de e-mail registrado e nome da empresa
  4. Processaremos sua solicitação em até 30 dias.

O Que é Excluído

Quando sua conta é excluída, os seguintes dados são removidos permanentemente:

  • Seu perfil de conta e credenciais
  • Todas as chaves de API e configurações de webhook
  • Modelos de mensagem e fluxos de chatbot
  • Listas de contatos e segmentos de audiência
  • Histórico de campanhas e dados analíticos
  • Logs de mensagens e relatórios de entrega

O Que Retemos

De acordo com os requisitos legais, retemos o seguinte pelos períodos especificados:

  • Registros de faturamento e impostos: 7 anos (exigido por regulamentações fiscais globais).
  • Análises agregadas e anonimizadas: Indefinidamente (não podem ser rastreadas até você).
  • Registros de conformidade legal: Conforme exigido pela lei aplicável, incluindo a LGPD.

Direitos sob a LGPD

Em conformidade com a Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), você tem o direito de solicitar a exclusão dos seus dados pessoais. Processaremos sua solicitação de exclusão em conformidade com a LGPD, retendo apenas os dados necessários para cumprir obrigações legais.

Notas Importantes

  • A exclusão da conta é permanente e não pode ser desfeita.
  • Assinaturas ativas serão canceladas imediatamente sem reembolso pelo período de faturamento atual.
  • Se você tem um plano Enterprise, entre em contato com seu gerente de conta antes de solicitar a exclusão.

Contato

Para dúvidas sobre exclusão de conta: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefone: +91 6376383348
content.es:
Cómo Eliminar Su Cuenta

Puede solicitar la eliminación de su cuenta StartMessaging y todos los datos asociados en cualquier momento. Hay dos formas de iniciar la eliminación de la cuenta:

Opción 1: A Través de Su Panel

  1. Inicie sesión en su panel de StartMessaging en app.startmessaging.com
  2. Vaya a Configuración → Cuenta → Eliminar Cuenta
  3. Confirme su solicitud ingresando su contraseña
  4. Su cuenta será desactivada inmediatamente y eliminada permanentemente en un plazo de 30 días.

Opción 2: Por Correo Electrónico

  1. Envíe un correo electrónico a startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com desde la dirección de correo electrónico asociada con su cuenta
  2. Asunto: "Solicitud de Eliminación de Cuenta"
  3. Incluya su dirección de correo electrónico registrada y nombre de la empresa
  4. Procesaremos su solicitud en un plazo de 30 días.

Qué Se Elimina

Cuando se elimina su cuenta, los siguientes datos se eliminan permanentemente:

  • Su perfil de cuenta y credenciales
  • Todas las claves de API y configuraciones de webhook
  • Plantillas de mensajes y flujos de chatbot
  • Listas de contactos y segmentos de audiencia
  • Historial de campañas y datos analíticos
  • Registros de mensajes e informes de entrega

Qué Retenemos

Según los requisitos legales, retenemos lo siguiente por los períodos especificados:

  • Registros de facturación e impuestos: 7 años (requerido por las regulaciones fiscales globales).
  • Análisis agregados y anonimizados: Indefinidamente (no se pueden rastrear hasta usted).
  • Registros de cumplimiento legal: Según lo requiera la ley aplicable.

Derechos ARCO

De conformidad con la Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares de México, usted tiene derecho a solicitar la cancelación (eliminación) de sus datos personales. Procesaremos su solicitud de eliminación en cumplimiento con sus Derechos ARCO.

Notas Importantes

  • La eliminación de la cuenta es permanente y no se puede deshacer.
  • Las suscripciones activas se cancelarán inmediatamente sin reembolso por el período de facturación actual.
  • Si tiene un plan Enterprise, comuníquese con su gerente de cuenta antes de solicitar la eliminación.

Contacto

Para preguntas sobre la eliminación de cuenta: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Teléfono: +91 6376383348
content.id:
Cara Menghapus Akun Anda

Anda dapat meminta penghapusan akun StartMessaging Anda dan semua data terkait kapan saja. Ada dua cara untuk memulai penghapusan akun:

Opsi 1: Melalui Dasbor Anda

  1. Masuk ke dasbor StartMessaging Anda di app.startmessaging.com
  2. Buka Pengaturan → Akun → Hapus Akun
  3. Konfirmasi permintaan Anda dengan memasukkan kata sandi Anda
  4. Akun Anda akan segera dinonaktifkan dan dihapus secara permanen dalam 30 hari.

Opsi 2: Melalui Email

  1. Kirim email ke startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com dari alamat email yang terkait dengan akun Anda
  2. Baris subjek: "Permintaan Penghapusan Akun"
  3. Sertakan alamat email terdaftar dan nama perusahaan Anda
  4. Kami akan memproses permintaan Anda dalam 30 hari.

Apa yang Dihapus

Ketika akun Anda dihapus, data berikut dihapus secara permanen:

  • Profil akun dan kredensial Anda
  • Semua kunci API dan konfigurasi webhook
  • Template pesan dan alur chatbot
  • Daftar kontak dan segmen audiens
  • Riwayat kampanye dan data analitik
  • Log pesan dan laporan pengiriman

Apa yang Kami Simpan

Sesuai persyaratan hukum, kami menyimpan data berikut untuk periode yang ditentukan:

  • Catatan penagihan dan pajak: 7 tahun (diwajibkan oleh peraturan pajak global).
  • Analitik agregat dan anonim: Tanpa batas waktu (tidak dapat dilacak kembali kepada Anda).
  • Catatan kepatuhan hukum: Sesuai yang diwajibkan oleh hukum yang berlaku, termasuk UU PDP.

Hak Anda Berdasarkan UU PDP

Sesuai dengan Undang-Undang Pelindungan Data Pribadi (UU PDP No. 27 Tahun 2022), Anda memiliki hak untuk meminta penghapusan data pribadi Anda. Kami akan memproses permintaan penghapusan Anda sesuai dengan UU PDP, hanya menyimpan data yang diperlukan untuk memenuhi kewajiban hukum.

Catatan Penting

  • Penghapusan akun bersifat permanen dan tidak dapat dibatalkan.
  • Langganan aktif akan segera dibatalkan tanpa pengembalian dana untuk periode penagihan saat ini.
  • Jika Anda memiliki paket Enterprise, silakan hubungi manajer akun Anda sebelum meminta penghapusan.

Kontak

Untuk pertanyaan tentang penghapusan akun: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telepon: +91 6376383348
content.ar:
كيفية حذف حسابك

يمكنك طلب حذف حساب StartMessaging الخاص بك وجميع البيانات المرتبطة به في أي وقت. هناك طريقتان لبدء حذف الحساب:

الخيار الأول: عبر لوحة التحكم

  1. سجل الدخول إلى لوحة تحكم StartMessaging على app.startmessaging.com
  2. انتقل إلى الإعدادات ← الحساب ← حذف الحساب
  3. أكد طلبك بإدخال كلمة المرور الخاصة بك
  4. سيتم إلغاء تنشيط حسابك فوراً وحذفه نهائياً خلال 30 يوماً.

الخيار الثاني: عبر البريد الإلكتروني

  1. أرسل بريداً إلكترونياً إلى startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com من عنوان البريد الإلكتروني المرتبط بحسابك
  2. سطر الموضوع: "طلب حذف الحساب"
  3. قم بتضمين عنوان بريدك الإلكتروني المسجل واسم الشركة
  4. سنعالج طلبك في غضون 30 يوماً.

ما الذي يتم حذفه

عند حذف حسابك، تتم إزالة البيانات التالية نهائياً:

  • ملف تعريف حسابك وبيانات الاعتماد
  • جميع مفاتيح واجهة برمجة التطبيقات وتكوينات الويب هوك
  • قوالب الرسائل وتدفقات الشات بوت
  • قوائم جهات الاتصال وشرائح الجمهور
  • سجل الحملات وبيانات التحليلات
  • سجلات الرسائل وتقارير التسليم

ما نحتفظ به

وفقاً للمتطلبات القانونية، نحتفظ بما يلي للفترات المحددة:

  • سجلات الفوترة والضرائب: 7 سنوات (مطلوبة بموجب لوائح الضرائب العالمية).
  • التحليلات المجمعة والمجهولة المصدر: إلى أجل غير مسمى (لا يمكن تتبعها إليك).
  • سجلات الامتثال القانوني: حسب ما يقتضيه القانون المعمول به، بما في ذلك قانون حماية البيانات الشخصية الإماراتي (PDPL).

حقوقك بموجب قانون حماية البيانات الإماراتي

وفقاً للمرسوم بقانون اتحادي رقم 45 لسنة 2021 بشأن حماية البيانات الشخصية، لديك الحق في طلب حذف بياناتك الشخصية. سنعالج طلب الحذف الخاص بك وفقاً للقانون، مع الاحتفاظ فقط بالبيانات اللازمة للوفاء بالالتزامات القانونية.

ملاحظات مهمة

  • حذف الحساب نهائي ولا يمكن التراجع عنه.
  • سيتم إلغاء الاشتراكات النشطة فوراً دون استرداد لفترة الفوترة الحالية.
  • إذا كان لديك خطة مؤسسات، يرجى الاتصال بمدير حسابك قبل طلب الحذف.

اتصل بنا

لأسئلة حول حذف الحساب: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | الهاتف: +91 6376383348
content.tr:
Hesabınızı Nasıl Silersiniz

StartMessaging hesabınızın ve tüm ilişkili verilerin silinmesini istediğiniz zaman talep edebilirsiniz. Hesap silme işlemini başlatmanın iki yolu vardır:

Seçenek 1: Kontrol Paneliniz Üzerinden

  1. app.startmessaging.com adresinden StartMessaging kontrol panelinize giriş yapın
  2. Ayarlar → Hesap → Hesabı Sil bölümüne gidin
  3. Şifrenizi girerek talebinizi onaylayın
  4. Hesabınız derhal devre dışı bırakılacak ve 30 gün içinde kalıcı olarak silinecektir.

Seçenek 2: E-posta ile

  1. Hesabınızla ilişkili e-posta adresinden startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com adresine bir e-posta gönderin
  2. Konu satırı: "Hesap Silme Talebi"
  3. Kayıtlı e-posta adresinizi ve şirket adınızı ekleyin
  4. Talebinizi 30 gün içinde işleme alacağız.

Neler Silinir

Hesabınız silindiğinde, aşağıdaki veriler kalıcı olarak kaldırılır:

  • Hesap profiliniz ve kimlik bilgileriniz
  • Tüm API anahtarları ve webhook yapılandırmaları
  • Mesaj şablonları ve chatbot akışları
  • İletişim listeleri ve kitle segmentleri
  • Kampanya geçmişi ve analitik verileri
  • Mesaj günlükleri ve teslimat raporları

Neler Saklanır

Yasal gerekliliklere uygun olarak, belirtilen süreler boyunca aşağıdakileri saklarız:

  • Faturalandırma ve vergi kayıtları: 7 yıl (küresel vergi düzenlemelerince zorunludur).
  • Toplu anonim analizler: Süresiz olarak (size kadar izlenemez).
  • Yasal uyumluluk kayıtları: Geçerli yasaların gerektirdiği şekilde, KVKK dahil.

KVKK Kapsamında Haklarınız

6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (KVKK) uyarınca, kişisel verilerinizin silinmesini veya yok edilmesini talep etme hakkına sahipsiniz. Silme talebinizi KVKK'ya uygun olarak işleyeceğiz ve yalnızca yasal yükümlülükleri yerine getirmek için gerekli olan verileri saklayacağız.

Önemli Notlar

  • Hesap silme kalıcıdır ve geri alınamaz.
  • Aktif abonelikler mevcut faturalandırma dönemi için iade yapılmadan derhal iptal edilecektir.
  • Kurumsal bir planınız varsa, silme talebinde bulunmadan önce lütfen hesap yöneticinizle iletişime geçin.

İletişim

Hesap silme hakkında sorularınız için: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefon: +91 6376383348
content.ng:
How to Delete Your Account

You can request the deletion of your StartMessaging account and all associated data at any time, in compliance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023. There are two ways to initiate account deletion:

Option 1: Through Your Dashboard

  1. Log in to your StartMessaging dashboard at app.startmessaging.com
  2. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account
  3. Confirm your request by entering your password
  4. Your account will be deactivated immediately and permanently deleted within 30 days.

Option 2: Via Email

  1. Send an email to startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com from the email address associated with your account
  2. Subject line: "Account Deletion Request"
  3. Include your registered email address and company name
  4. We will process your request within 30 days.

What Gets Deleted

When your account is deleted, the following data is permanently removed:

  • Your account profile and credentials
  • All API keys and webhook configurations
  • Message templates and chatbot flows
  • Contact lists and audience segments
  • Campaign history and analytics data
  • Message logs and delivery reports

What We Retain

Per legal requirements, we retain the following for the specified periods:

  • Billing and tax records: 7 years (required by global tax regulations).
  • Aggregate anonymized analytics: Indefinitely (cannot be traced back to you).
  • Legal compliance records: As required by applicable law, including the NDPA 2023.

Your Rights Under the NDPA

In accordance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023, you have the right to request the erasure of your personal data. We will process your deletion request in compliance with the NDPA, retaining only the data necessary to fulfil legal obligations. You may also lodge a complaint with the Nigeria Data Protection Commission (NDPC) if you believe your data rights have been violated.

Important Notes

  • Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone.
  • Active subscriptions will be canceled immediately with no refund for the current billing period.
  • If you have an Enterprise plan, please contact your account manager before requesting deletion.

Contact

For questions about account deletion: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
